body:
A Simple preliminary way to use our advection reconstruction stencils to do high-order Coriolis reconstruction

```
advection = WENO(grid)
coriolis = HydrostaticSphericalCoriolis(scheme = advection)
```

this PR is here just to test the idea, but the design will probably change

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

labels.description: So things don't blow up and boil the lobsters alive
labels.name: numerics 🧮

title: Wet point Coriolis scheme and bugfix in GM tapering
